Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s pale male with a scholarly bearing, wearing a halved black top hat and a black Victorian frock coat, frequently using a topaz spirit pendulum on a silver chain
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver-inlaid black cane, halved top hat
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned wearing cheap formal attire, a tuxedo, a halved top hat, and carrying a silver-inlaid black cane.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: cheap formal attire, tuxedo, halved top hat, silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.unique_identifier: always wears a black top hat split in half (halved top hat) and carries a silver chain with a pure topaz pendulum in his left sleeve

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: decrepit appearance, resembles Klein but lacks a scholarly air
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: literate, employed at an import and export company, resourceful and calculating — negotiated gas pipe installation to avoid debt
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Mentions his weekly salary (1 pound 10 soli) and his goal to study accountancy and grammar.
Benson Moretti.era_clothing_lock: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat

Melissa Moretti.skin_tone: pale, slightly thin-faced but with lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: Teenage girl with a focused expression, often tinkering with Victorian clockwork parts, wearing a simple linen blouse and a dark work apron.
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.distinguishing_features: Frequently tinkers with gears, bearings, and springs; vocal advocate for women's education.
Melissa Moretti.faction: Tingen Technical School — Steam and Machinery department student
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Added specific details about her mechanical hobbies and her reaction to the Shauds' traditionalist views.
Melissa Moretti.unique_identifier: tattered inherited veil cap and self-sewn school bag; brown eyes fixed in a habitual expression of calm exasperation toward her brothers

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.visual_anchor: Elderly man in a classic black scholar's robe whose eyes turn pitch-black during ritualistic magic.
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Lives in a bungalow in the North Borough suburbs; garden contains roses and gold mint; keeps a piano in his living room in memory of his deceased wife.
Old Neil.source_notes: Explicitly described his outfit in the chapter.
Old Neil.era_clothing_lock: classic black robe and felt black hat with a rounded edge

Ginger Sunny.unique_identifier: bright ginger red hair and a seductive, playful demeanor
Ginger Sunny.era_clothing_lock: revealing scarlet Victorian corset with black lace trim, ruffled skirts hiked up slightly, dark stockings
Ginger Sunny.face_description: striking features with a playful, seductive smile and rosy cheeks
Ginger Sunny.visual_anchor: fair 20s female with bright ginger red hair and a playful smile, wearing a revealing scarlet Victorian corset with black lace trim
Ginger Sunny.source_notes: Mentioned as someone the brawny man spent a night with, implying a prostitute or barmaid. Physical traits are guessed based on her name.

Tris.primary_clothing: Simple linen shirt, dark vest, worn trousers
Tris.visual_anchor: A shy, unremarkable young man with a round, amiable face and soft features, wearing a simple Victorian wool waistcoat and flat cap.
Tris.color_palette: pale cream, light brown, muted grey
Tris.source_notes: Referred to as Instigator Tris and having the true skills of an Assassin.
Tris.unique_identifier: round, amiable face with an unmistakable shy expression; unremarkable boy who retreats to corners
Tris.era_clothing_lock: simple Victorian beige wool waistcoat, white cotton shirt, brown wool trousers, and a modest brown flat cap

Joyce Meyer.face_description: aquiline nose like a hawk's beak
Joyce Meyer.visual_anchor: A pale young man with haunted, wide eyes and a trembling smile, wearing a salt-stained charcoal Victorian morning coat and a rumpled white shirt.
Joyce Meyer.color_palette: pitch black, golden blond, pale ivory, charcoal grey
Joyce Meyer.distinguishing_features: haggard appearance from a traumatic journey, joyful glint in eyes
Joyce Meyer.accessories: halved top hat, gold-inlaid wooden cane
Joyce Meyer.source_notes: Explicit physical description provided during his visit to Klein.
Joyce Meyer.unique_identifier: trembling pale smile and haunted, wide-eyed expression resulting from sea-travel trauma

Swain.unique_identifier: imposing burly stature of a Folk of Rage with a weathered face that suggests heavy drinking
Swain.era_clothing_lock: unbuttoned dark blue Victorian wool waistcoat, loose white linen shirt with rolled up sleeves, dark trousers, heavy leather boots
Swain.face_description: rough, weathered features with a heavy jaw and slightly red nose from drinking
Swain.visual_anchor: burly 50s male with a weathered face and red nose, wearing an unbuttoned dark blue Victorian waistcoat and loose white shirt
Swain.color_palette: dark blue, rough brown, faded white
Swain.distinguishing_features: slightly red nose from heavy drinking
Swain.source_notes: Described as boss of Evil Dragon Bar, former Mandated Punisher captain, older than Old Neil, Folk of Rage, and a heavy drinker.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Old Neil explains the Goddess's titles and correspondences during the ritual in Chapter 51.

Lord of Storms.primary_clothing: robes woven from dark storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.face_description: Stern, majestic face with a strong jawline, intense brow arch, and piercing eyes.
Lord of Storms.visual_anchor: ageless male, muscular build, wild dark blue hair, electric blue eyes, wearing robes of storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.color_palette: storm black, dark blue, electric yellow, charcoal grey
Lord of Storms.faction: Church of the Lord of Storms
Lord of Storms.source_notes: Origin myth details provided by Dunn Smith.

Ademisaul.unique_identifier: demoralized eyes that occasionally bleed blood-red liquid, half-insane expression, always muttering
Ademisaul.era_clothing_lock: old worn linen shirt, dirty blue working-class jeans
Ademisaul.face_description: pale face with demoralized, half-insane eyes and an expression of constant torment
Ademisaul.visual_anchor: pale early 20s male with messy black hair and bleeding demoralized eyes, wearing an old linen shirt and dirty blue working-class jeans
Ademisaul.color_palette: faded blue, dingy white, pale skin tone, blood red
Ademisaul.primary_clothing: old linen shirt and blue jeans
Ademisaul.distinguishing_features: eyes bleed when looking at certain spiritual entities
Ademisaul.source_notes: Text explicitly describes him as a pale young man with messy black hair, an old linen shirt, blue jeans, and demoralized crazy eyes that bleed.

Justice.face_description: elegant and refined features hidden by fog
Justice.visual_anchor: A slender young woman in an elegant Victorian dress, shrouded in gray fog during the Gathering.
Justice.distinguishing_features: The back of her chair above the gray fog features an illusory constellation forming the symbol of a 'Giant Dragon'.
Justice.source_notes: Klein observed the symbol after she became a Beyonder.
